---
title: "IP ACLs"
editor: visual
code-block-bg: dark
---

## General Info

**IP access-list**: Defines traffic - either via permit/deny

**IP Access-group**: applies an ACL to a physical `interface`

-   `ip access-group <ACL name> {in|out}`
-   `ipv6 traffic-filter <ACL name> {in|out}`

**Access-class**: applies an ACL to a `line` (VTY, Console, Aux) etc.

``` default
ipv4
----
line con 0
 access-class <acl name> {in|out}
 
ipv6
----
line vty 0
  ipv6 access-class <ACL name> {in|out}
```

## Time Range

1.  Define a Time Range

Apply the time range in the ACL

``` default
time-range WORK_HOURS
 periodic weekdays 08:00 to 17:00
```

`time-range WORK_HOURS` → name of the time range

`periodic weekdays 08:00 to 17:00` → applies Monday–Friday, 8 AM to 5 PM

Other options:

absolute <start-date> <start-time> to <end-date> <end-time> → one-time period

daily <start-time> to <end-time> → every day

monthly <day-of-month> <start-time> to <end-time> → monthly period

-   

    `periodic weekdays 08:00 to 17:00` → applies **Monday–Friday, 8 AM to 5 PM**

<!-- -->

-   

    Other options:

    -   

    -   

        `absolute <start-date> <start-time> to <end-date> <end-time>` → one-time period

    -   

    -   

        `daily <start-time> to <end-time>` → every day

    -   

    -   

        `monthly <day-of-month> <start-time> to <end-time>` → monthly period
